channel.title: AI & Tech News Aggregator
channel.description: Aggregated AI and Tech news from 11 sources

item.title: Salesforce Agentforce: What you need to know
item.description: [MarTech] We've updated our page on Agentforce with details on Intent-Aware Search in Agentforce for Commerce. The post Salesforce Agentforce: What you need to know appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: China bars Manus co-founders from leaving country amid Meta deal review: FT
item.description: [Business Times] The case highlights Beijing’s broader concerns about the loss of valuable technology to a geopolitical rival

item.title: New partnerships, facilities by JTC to bolster startups at LaunchPad @ one-north
item.description: [Business Times] This includes a new co-working and event space for networking, investor meetings and community events

item.title: Athena signals Zeta’s push into AI-driven marketing systems
item.description: [MarTech] Zeta is betting that tighter integration of data and AI will reduce the gap between insight and action. The post Athena signals Zeta’s push into AI-driven marketing systems appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Why AI personalization comes with strict limits
item.description: [MarTech] Consumers are more willing to trade data for better recommendations, but they are very clear about what the red lines are. The post Why AI personalization comes with strict limits appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: David Sacks is no longer the White House AI and Crypto Czar
item.description: [The Verge AI] David Sacks, the venture capitalist and tech billionaire who'd become Silicon Valley's primary advocate inside the White House and a key architect of its aggressive AI policy initiatives, revealed on Thursday that he was no longer a special government employee - and therefore no longer President Don

item.title: Anthropic Supply-Chain-Risk Designation Halted by Judge
item.description: [WIRED AI] A judge temporarily blocked the Trump administration’s designation, clearing the way for Anthropic to keep doing business without the label starting next week.

item.title: Google is making it easier to import another AI’s memory into Gemini
item.description: [The Verge AI] After Anthropic updated its tool for copying another AI's memory into Claude earlier this month, Google Gemini is rolling out new "Import Memory" and "Import Chat History" features on desktop that can help users quickly copy over everything their current AI already knows about them. To use the "Impo

item.title: Apple will reportedly allow other AI chatbots to plug into Siri
item.description: [The Verge AI] Apple's iOS 27 update will allow users to choose the AI chatbot they want to link with Siri. That's according to a report from Bloomberg's Mark Gurman, who says third-party chatbots downloaded from the App Store, like Google's Gemini or Anthropic's Claude, will be able to fetch replies for Siri - si

item.title: Apple’s AI Playlist Playground is bad at music
item.description: [The Verge AI] Apple Music: "What do you want to hear?" Me: "Atmospheric instrumental black metal to write to." Apple Music: "Here's three metal songs with vocals, a field recording, an ambient electronic track, and a piece of doom jazz." I am skeptical of AI's ability to serve up the music I want to begin with, b

item.title: Meet the Tech Reporters Using AI to Help Write and Edit Their Stories
item.description: [WIRED AI] Independent writers are using AI agents all throughout their reporting process. What’s the value of a human journalist, anyway?

item.title: Elon Musk's X advertising boycott lawsuit dismissed by US judge
item.description: [BBC Technology] US District Judge Jane Boyle said the company had failed to show it had suffered any harm under federal competition laws.

item.title: The latest AI-powered martech news and releases
item.description: [MarTech] As AI leaders scramble for viable business models, the moves from OpenAI and Meta look less strategic and more like panic under pressure. The post The latest AI-powered martech news and releases appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Data built modern marketing, but AI is rewriting the rules
item.description: [MarTech] Marketers have long treated data as the goal. AI flips that model. Here’s how to adapt your data strategy. The post Data built modern marketing, but AI is rewriting the rules appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: How NotebookLM turns marketing docs into usable insights
item.description: [MarTech] Upload research, reports and campaign data to explore patterns, answer questions and uncover insights from your own material. The post How NotebookLM turns marketing docs into usable insights appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: 'A game-changing moment for social media' - what next for big tech after landmark addiction verdict?
item.description: [BBC Technology] The ruling could be the beginning of the end of social media as we know it, writes the BBC's technology editor Zoe Kleinman.

item.title: Tencent integrates WeChat with OpenClaw AI agent amid China tech battle
item.description: [Business Times] The software, called ClawBot, will appear as a contact within China’s most popular app

item.title: China’s AI boom is changing the game for equities investors
item.description: [Straits Times] An analyst recommends the need for broad-based diversification across Asia to capture opportunities and manage risk.

item.title: AI Research Is Getting Harder to Separate From Geopolitics
item.description: [WIRED AI] A policy change announced by NeurIPS, the world’s leading AI research conference, drew widespread backlash from Chinese researchers this week and then was quickly reversed.

item.title: Why SoftBank’s new $40B loan points to a 2026 OpenAI IPO
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Wall Street giants JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs are extending a 12-month, unsecured loan to the Japanese conglomerate.

item.title: BYD's annual profit drops for first time in four years as price war hurts margins
item.description: [CNA Tech] BYD's net profit fell 19 per cent to 32.6 billion yuan (US$4.72 billion), with chairman Wang Chuanfu saying competition has reached "fever pitch".

item.title: Memory chip giant SK hynix could help end ‘RAMmageddon’ with blockbuster US IPO
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] SK hynix’s potential U.S. listing could raise $10-$14 billion to help it build more capacity, encourage others to follow, and end the 'RAMmageddon' memory shortage.

item.title: The latest in data centers, AI, and energy
item.description: [The Verge AI] Massive new data centers are the physical foundation for tech companies’ hopes and dreams for AI. But the rush to expand warehouses full of energy-hungry servers has also kicked up fights across the world over their impact on power grids, utility bills, nearby communities, and the environment.

item.title: Apple hires ex-Google executive to head AI marketing amid push to improve Siri
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: EU Commission web platform hit by cyber-attack on March 24
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: PS5 price hiked by £90 due to global 'pressures'
item.description: [BBC Technology] The changes will see the recommended retail price of the PS5 rise from £479.99 to £569.99 in the UK.

item.title: VCs are betting billions on AI’s next wave, so why is OpenAI killing Sora?
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] When an 82-year-old Kentucky woman was offered $26 million from an AI company that wanted to build a data center on her land, she said no. Sure, that same company can try to rezone 2,000 acres nearby anyway, but as AI infrastructure stretches further into the real world, the

item.title: Apple Still Plans to Sell iPhones When It Turns 100
item.description: [WIRED AI] As the tech giant turns 50, WIRED spoke to executives about how they plan to win in the AI era.

item.title: Utility Entergy says revised Meta data-center deal to deliver higher customer savings
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: A股上市3年后又拟赴港IPO，拆解12倍牛股源杰科技的资本阳谋
item.description: [钛媒体] 495倍市盈率的千元股能站稳？

item.title: Sony to hike PlayStation 5 prices again as memory chip costs surge
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: OpenAI shuts down Sora while Meta gets shut out in court
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] When an 82-year-old Kentucky woman was offered $26 million from an AI company that wanted to build a data center on her land, she said no. Sure, that same company can try to rezone 2,000 acres nearby anyway, but as AI infrastructure stretches further into the real world, the

item.title: Two fund managers tapped for new $1.5b Anchor Fund tranche to boost Singapore’s IPO pipeline
item.description: [Straits Times] The Ministry of Trade and Industry and Temasek have appointed Fullerton Fund Management and 65 Equity Partners.

item.title: 等在500万AI缺口外的年轻人
item.description: [钛媒体] 企业需要工程能力，高校却仍以论文和考试成绩评价学生。

item.title: 氪星晚报｜菜鸟集团与泰国正大集团旗下CP AXTRA签署战略合作协议；平头哥镇岳510出货量超50万片，多家存储公司SSD已搭载该芯片；猎户星空推出AI Agent服务机器人
item.description: [36氪] 大公司： 日本ispace公司将美国国家航空航天局（NASA）资助的登月任务推迟至2030年 日本航天器初创企业ispace周五表示，在两次登月着陆器任务失败后，公司进行战略调整，将把一项由美国政府资助的月球探测任务再度推迟至2030年，并裁减全球员工。此次公告凸显出该企业前景不明朗。当前美国正联合商业及国际伙伴重组太空任务。（新浪财经） 菜鸟集团与泰国正大集团旗下CP AXTRA签署战略合作协议 36氪获悉，今日菜鸟集团与泰国正大集团旗下CP AXTRA签署战略合作协议。菜鸟将应用其数字供应链科技、仓储自动化技术，以及海外仓储网络运营经验，全力支持CP AXTRA 在泰国及东

item.title: More Singapore customers buy Dyson’s AI-powered vacuum cleaners, pushing operating profit past $1b
item.description: [Straits Times] Dyson also launched 13 new products in 2025, the most in a single year.

item.title: 具身觉醒、智造跃迁，物理AI如何在制造业落地？
item.description: [钛媒体] 峰会全程内容，将在钛媒体微信公众号的“Physical AI Moment | 物理AI现场”主题IP直播间，同步线上直播。

item.title: Lloyds bank reveals IT glitch affected almost half a million customers
item.description: [BBC Technology] In a letter to the Treasury Select Committee, Lloyds apologised and said some compensation had been paid.

item.title: The Latest AI Documentary Asks: Just How Scared Should We Be?
item.description: [WIRED AI] The AI Doc: Or How I Became an Apocaloptimist seeks the middle ground on a polarizing technology—and ends up letting tech execs like Sam Altman off the hook.

item.title: Singapore stocks rebound amid mixed showing in region
item.description: [Straits Times] The benchmark Straits Times Index gained 10.42 points to finish at 4,898.18.

item.title: 周鸿祎的AI突围：不下场，就出局
item.description: [钛媒体] “手搓”百个智能体的周鸿祎，只是这场大潮的缩影。

item.title: 国产手机涨价，抛弃不需要AI手机的人？
item.description: [钛媒体] 被迫为AI内卷分担成本。

item.title: 罗福莉：AGI已经实现了，下一步是“自进化”
item.description: [钛媒体] 杨植麟、张鹏、罗福莉中关村巅峰论AI。

item.title: I Asked ChatGPT 500 Questions. Here Are the Ads I Saw Most Often
item.description: [WIRED AI] Ads are rolling out across the US on ChatGPT’s free tier. I asked OpenAI's bot 500 questions to see what these ads were like and how they related to my prompts.

item.title: Japan firms weigh merging power chip businesses
item.description: [CNA Tech] Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi's administration has set a new sales target for domestically produced microchips, aiming for an eightfold increase by 2040 compared with 2020 levels.

item.title: 瞄准多场景、全周期运动体验，趣冲健身推出多款自研AI智能健身设备｜最前线
item.description: [36氪] 作者｜黄楠 编辑｜袁斯来 一个庞大的万亿级健康消费市场正加速形成。根据国际健身协会（IFAI）等报告显示，近年来，数字健身市场增速高达41.4%，全球健身行业规模预计2030年达1.5万亿美元。其中，中国健康产业规模在2025年已突破10万亿元规模，健康生活服务赛道以每年超15%增速增长。 然而，传统健身行业长期受困于用户留存难、运营效率低、服务同质化三大瓶颈。在这一背景下，从单一场馆运营转向“AI+场景+硬件”的系统化智能升级，正成为行业提升效率、应对市场变化的核心趋势。         &

item.title: 对标英伟达EgoScale数据路径，清华系孵化星忆科技拿到首轮融资
item.description: [36氪] 文｜任倩 具身数据层的全球竞赛正在迅速升温。NVIDIA Research在2026年发布EgoScale数据与训练框架，在Ego-centric人类操作视频上训练VLA模型，用 20,854小时带动作标注的第一人称人类视频，观察到数据规模和验证损失之间接近对数线性的scaling law。1X收集人类第一视角及家庭行为数据，通过 Sunday项目采集百万小时级家庭场景视频。光轮智能采用仿真合成数据和人类视频数据（EgoSuite）的混合路线，宣称累计交付突破100万小时，估值飙向十亿美金。 几个月内，行业关注点已不再只是“谁采得更多”，而是“谁能把Human-centric /Ego

item.title: 杨植麟/张鹏/夏立雪/罗福莉/黄超，谈龙虾，谈“Token经济学”
item.description: [36氪] 文｜周鑫雨 王欣逸 钟楚笛 编辑｜周鑫雨 Token，在技术语境下，是模型处理文本时的最小单位；在商业语境下，则成了AI服务最主流的计费方式。 近期，让Token被黄仁勋、吴泳铭等人，拔高到“经济学”概念的导火索，是当下全球最火的开源Agent框架——俗称为“龙虾”的OpenClaw。 它第一次让Agent的概念突破极客圈层，走向普罗大众；同时，运行龙虾庞大的Token消耗，也让习惯使用免费ChatBot的普通用户，第一次感知到：智能，是一种昂贵的、需要购买的资源。 2026年3月27日，中关村论坛。在主题为“OpenClaw与AI开源”的圆桌上，五位分别来自大模

item.title: 「龙虾」火热，硬件掘金，这里有10个最新的硬件项目
item.description:
[36氪] 文｜周鑫雨 钟楚笛 编辑｜周鑫雨 若是在春节后来到深圳华强北，你大概率会撞上这样一幕： 在赛格电子世界大厦的二手设备批发档口，短短十几分钟，就有3、4位操着不同口音的客户，询问是否有适配“龙虾”的硬件。一台部署好“龙虾”的一体机，雅称“虾缸”，售价近期一路从1000元出头，涨到2000元。 华强北，是观察科技行业创业风向的窗口。AI眼镜、录音笔、玩偶……在这里，万物皆可适配“龙虾”。一名科技从业者对我们表示：“出现在华强北，说明做到消费级��。”
△3月初深圳的一场千人龙虾硬件聚会。图源：inno100。 龙虾，大名OpenClaw，当下全球最火的开源Agent框

item.title: Europe’s economy starting to feel pain from Trump’s Iran war
item.description: [Straits Times] The current shock 'is probably beyond what we can imagine at the moment': ECB president

item.title: Spot electricity prices in S’pore hit highest level in 2026 ahead of quarterly tariff revision
item.description: [Straits Times] Electricity retailers have hiked the prices of new contracts and removed several discounted plans.

item.title: This time it’s different: LaunchPad @ one-north’s next act signals a maturing startup ecosystem
item.description: [Business Times] The next iteration of it may be more structured and more technologically advanced

item.title: Campaigners welcome Meta and YouTube's defeat in landmark social media addiction trial
item.description: [BBC Technology] A woman has been awarded $6m in a verdict that could have implications for hundreds of other cases in the US.

item.title: Why the Mac Mini is out of stock: A look at Singapore’s OpenClaw buzz
item.description: [Business Times] A new AI agent has taken the world by storm. Is this a new hype cycle or the start of a tech...

item.title: 目标氢能及液流电池市场，实现AEM材料性能突破，「志青博材」获融科储能领投千万元天使+轮融资 | 36氪首发
item.description: [36氪] 文 | 张冰冰 编辑 | 阿至 36氪获悉，苏州市志青博材科技有限公司（以下简称「志青博材」）近日宣布完成千万元天使+轮融资，由大连融科储能集团股份有限公司领投，老股东熔拓资本跟投，资金将主要用于核心材料研发及工程化推进。 「志青博材」成立于2023年6月，致力于推进氢能、液流电池等长周期储能领域中核心材料——阴离子交换膜（AEM）的全国产化研发与量产。目前，「志青博材」已打通从树脂合成到膜材料制备的完整技术链条，拥有多项自主知识产权，实现树脂单釜数十公斤级稳定生产能力，可交付大宽幅的电解水制氢膜、液流电池膜等系列产品，满足不同场景对高性能膜

item.title: David Sacks is done as AI czar — here’s what he’s doing instead
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Sacks will be much further from the power center in Washington than since the outset of this second Trump administration.

item.title: Anthropic wins injunction against Trump administration over Defense Department saga
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] A federal judge has ordered that the Trump administration rescind recent restrictions it placed on the AI company.

item.title: Judge rejects Pentagon's attempt to 'cripple' Anthropic
item.description: [BBC Technology] A federal judge told the government it could not immediately enforce a ban on Anthropic’s tools.

item.title: Judge sides with Anthropic to temporarily block the Pentagon’s ban
item.description: [The Verge AI] After Anthropic's weeks-long standoff with the Pentagon, the company won one milestone: A judge granted Anthropic a preliminary injunction in its lawsuit, which sought to reverse its government blacklisting while the judicial process plays out. "The Department of War's records show that it designate
